item.title: Last call - Deadline to sign the Stop Destroying Games initiative is tomorrow (31st)
item.description: Stop Destroying Games, the European Citizens' Initiative (ECI) against planned obsolescence tactics used to disable video games, closes on the 31st. It collected over 1.4 million signatures, and if you are a European citizen, you can still add your own. https://eci.ec.europa.eu/045/public/#/screen/home Please note that an ECI is not a simple petition, it is an official EU process to get a specific issue to the attention of the European Commission, as described here https://citizens-initiative.europa.eu/how-it-works_en This is one of less than 10 such initiatives that were ever able to cross the minimum threshold. After it closes, the next steps will be a presentation to the European Commission representatives, followed by discussions with all involved parties, including industry experts, game developers, publishers, etc.
item.dc:creator: The11thPlague

item.title: Blackstone CEO was LUIGI’D!
item.description:
Blackstone Real Estate Income Trust CEO, Wesley LePatner killed in NYC office shooting. Blackstone is one of the corporations behind the mass purchasing of affordable housing, and increasing the prices of these homes exponentially. Blackstone is a large part of the horrendously inflated housing costs and shortages in America. In short, LePanter was the reason we could not afford to buy a house.
The shooter, Shane Tamura, appears to be having his motives obscured by corporate media. They’re focusing on his history as a football player, and the fact that the NFL’s offices are housed in the same building. But Tamura’s clear destination was the 33rd floor, which housed the offices of Blackstone, and LePatner. The NFL offices are not on that floor. https://www.aljazeera.com/amp/news/2025/7/29/nyc-shooting-what-we-know-about-the-victims-suspect-shane-tamura
item.dc:creator: haIucid

item.title: Advertising scam account Rexam95 at it again!
item.description:
Rexam95's new post https://imgur.com/gallery/random-video-dump-SvQrNiN is just a clone of DaveshShingari's https://imgur.com/gallery/random-video-dump-random-people-around-world-whn4yes with ads in it.
I'm just gonna keep calling out scam accounts now till they ban my 14 year old account permanently.
item.dc:creator: ModsSometimesHeedMyScamWarnings

item.dc:creator: RaspK

item.title: What happened to separation of church and state
item.description: Fp edit: for front page that it's always like to bring in something going on with my personal life or some experience when I can. For those that don't know my wife and I were homeless for a little while at the start of the year. We were first told to reach out to Christian and Catholic organizations for help. Out of any group that I had to deal with, they're the ones that treated me with the least dignity and or respect. I'm a disabled veteran without any criminal background, no drug addiction, just ptsd, depression, anxiety, while being autistic and ADHD. And to top it off my wife has an autoimmune disease which is resulted in end stage liver cirrhosis. Our existence is pretty tough. We have no family and a backing, and thought that one of the churches would be able to help us. All we got was scripture and lectures and scrutiny. Why is it that felons get treated better than us? I've served my communities, I've served my country for what? As I type this my wife and I are looking down the barrel of going homeless again because of her living situation going upside down. Our landlords are old Maga, and have failed to repair this property and are now trying to combat us. The wall is on our side, but I do not have the energy, health, or money to deal with the lawyer, or Court proceedings. It is the church people, the most hateful people, who are guilty of the most egregious of crimes. And that's why they are all verminantly fighting to cover their tracks, and change laws. They know they're guilty, we know they're guilty, they just put enough Grime and gum in the gears to make it so that anything any direction is too slow. The Christian leaning religions are the first to make enemies out of everybody else. They don't even preach peace anymore. We all neither was an issue when pastors were coming out and stating that their congregations were saying Jesus was too woke. ----- So, if you didn't believe that the separation of church and state was kicked through and throwing on the ground. Here's your sign Source for those who can't use a search engine https://thehill.com/homenews/administration/5423969-trump-memo-religious-expression/

item.title: "Cats aren't affectionate!" You sure bout that?
item.description: Dobby gets in these moods where he can't control himself. Question mark tail twitching like crazy, working overtime at the bakery, reaching out to touch my face. It melts my heart
